title: The Taco Bell Story
content:
Let me tell you about Taco Bell. I was in California, and I noticed these Taco Bells everywhere. Long lines. People loved them. The food was cheap and fast.

So I did what any good investor would do—I ate there! Talked to the manager. Looked at the numbers. Found out they were expanding like crazy.

Wall Street? They didn't care. 'It's just tacos,' they said.

But here's the thing—I could see it. Regular people could see it. The stock went up 10x.

That's the beauty of 'invest in what you know.' You don't need a Bloomberg terminal. You need eyes and curiosity.
